sellers_note: This 2024 GMC Yukon Denali is a true standout in the luxury SUV segment. Boasting an impressive array of premium features, this Yukon Denali is the perfect blend of power, capability, and refined sophistication.- Bluetooth HandsFree Cellphone- ASSIST STEPS, POWER-RETRACTABLE WITH PERIMETER LIGHTING- SUNROOF, POWER PANORAMIC, DUAL-PANE- ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE- MAX TRAILERING PACKAGE- 22'' MULTI-SPOKE CHROME WHEELSStep inside this Yukon Denali and be enveloped in unparalleled comfort and convenience. The Bose 14-speaker surround sound system, heated and ventilated front seats, and power-folding third-row seating create an exceptional driving experience. Cutting-edge technology, including Super Cruise hands-free driving, a 15-inch head-up display, and wireless charging, seamlessly integrate to provide effortless control and connectivity.Beyond its impressive interior, the Yukon Denali's exterior commands attention with its bold, muscular presence. The White Frost Tricoat paint and chrome accents exude an elegant, high-end aesthetic, while the power-retractable assist steps and 22-inch multi-spoke chrome wheels add a touch of rugged sophistication.Whether navigating the city streets or tackling off-road adventures, this 2024 GMC Yukon Denali is built to impress. Its EcoTec3 6.2L V8 engine, paired with a 10-speed automatic transmission and 4WD, delivers the power and capability you demand. The advanced trailering features, including the ProGrade Trailering System and extra capacity cooling, make towing a breeze.Experience the pinnacle of luxury and capability in the 2024 GMC Yukon Denali. Schedule a test drive today and discover the difference this exceptional SUV can make in your life.Price does not include licensing costs, registration fees, and taxes which are to be paid by the consumer.
